category_sources: source_facts.description identifies httpd as the Apache HTTP server; official Apache homepage describes it as an open-source web server.
display_name_sources: source_facts.description uses Apache HTTP server; official Apache project pages use Apache HTTP Server.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official Apache httpd site; official site provides a dedicated /docs documentation area.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official Apache httpd developer/contribute pages state the software source is in Apache SVN and list the 2.4 stable branch repository.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies Apache HTTP server; source_facts.executables lists server and administration tools such as httpd, apachectl, ab, and htpasswd.
